    rw [h₂]
    exact not_irrational_of_rat (2 : ℚ)
  have h₄ : f (8 ^ (1 / 3)) = abs (Int.floor (8 ^ (1 / 3))) := h₀ _ h₃
  rw [h₂] at h₄
  norm_num at h₄
  have h₅ : Irrational (-Real.pi) := by
    exact irrational_neg.mpr irrational_pi
  have h₆ : f (-Real.pi) = (Int.ceil (-Real.pi)) ^ 2 := h₁ _ h₅
  have h₇ : Int.ceil (-Real.pi) = -3 := by
    norm_num [Real.pi_le_four, Real.three_le_pi]
  rw [h₇] at h₆
  norm_num at h₆
  have h₈ : Irrational (Real.sqrt 50) := by
    exact irrational_sqrt.mpr (by norm_num)
  have h₉ : f (Real.sqrt 50) = (Int.ceil (Real.sqrt 50)) ^ 2 := h₁ _ h₈
  have h₁₀ : Int.ceil (Real.sqrt 50) = 8 := by
    norm_num [Real.sqrt_le_iff, Real.lt_sqrt, show (7 : ℝ) ^ 2 = 49 by norm_num, show (8 : ℝ) ^ 2 = 64 by norm_num]
  rw [h₁₀] at h₉
  norm_num at h₉
  have h₁₁ : ¬ Irrational (9 / 2) := by
    exact not_irrational_of_rat (9 / 2 : ℚ)
  have h₁₂ : f (9 / 2) = abs (Int.floor (9 / 2)) := h₀ _ h₁₁
  norm_num at h₁₂
  norm_num [h₄, h₆, h₉, h₁₂]

have h₂ : 8 ^ (1 / 3) = 2 := by
    norm_num [show (8 : ℝ) = 2 ^ 3 by norm_num]
  have h₃ : Irrational (-Real.pi) := by
    simpa using Real.irrational_pi.neg
  have h₄ : Irrational (Real.sqrt 50) := by
    apply Real.irrational_sqrt
    norm_num
  have h₅ : ¬Irrational (9 / 2) := by
    exact not_irrational_rat (9 / 2)
  rw [h₂, h₀ (9 / 2) h₅, h₁ (-Real.pi) h₃, h₁ (Real.sqrt 50) h₄]
  norm_num [Int.floor_eq_iff, Int.ceil_eq_iff]

  have h₆ : Irrational (Real.sqrt 50) := by
    exact irrational_sqrt.mpr (by norm_num)
  simp_all only [h₀, h₁, h₂, Int.floor_of_int, Int.ceil_of_int, Int.ceil_neg,

have h₂ : 8 ^ (1 / 3) = 2 := by
    norm_num [show (8 : ℝ) = 2 ^ 3 by norm_num]
  have h₃ : ¬ Irrational (8 ^ (1 / 3)) := by
    rw [h₂]
    exact not_irrational_of_rat (by norm_num)
  have h₄ : ¬ Irrational (9 / 2) := by
    exact not_irrational_of_rat (by norm_num)
  have h₅ : Irrational (-Real.pi) := by
    exact irrational_neg.mpr irrational_pi
  have h₆ : Irrational (Real.sqrt 50) := by
    exact irrational_sqrt.mpr (by norm_num)
  calc
    f (8 ^ (1 / 3)) + f (-Real.pi) + f (Real.sqrt 50) + f (9 / 2)
      = f 2 + f (-Real.pi) + f (Real.sqrt 50) + f (9 / 2) := by rw [h₂]
    _ = abs (Int.floor 2) + (Int.ceil (-Real.pi)) ^ 2 + (Int.ceil (Real.sqrt 50)) ^ 2 + abs (Int.floor (9 / 2)) := by
        rw [h₀ 2 h₃, h₁ (-Real.pi) h₅, h₁ (Real.sqrt 50) h₆, h₀ (9 / 2) h₄]
    _ = 2 + 9 + 49 + 2 := by
        norm_num [Int.floor_eq_iff, Int.ceil_eq_iff, Real.pi_pos, Real.sqrt_nonneg, Real.sq_sqrt]
    _ = 79 := by norm_num
